metadata.description: JHoraAI Master Relationship Knowledge Base and Event Dossier

categories.description: All events, transitions, conflicts, legal resolutions, and milestones in personal and marital partnerships

events.description: Onset of romantic feelings and mutual attraction between two individuals
Infatuation, secret admiration, or temporary romantic obsession with another individual
A formal or informal request or offer of marriage, exclusive commitment, or starting a relationship
The phase of active social meeting and companionship to assess mutual compatibility
A formal pre-marriage phase of getting to know each other under familial or social guidance
A formal agreement and social announcement of upcoming marriage, often with ring exchange
A legal, sacred, and social union of two individuals in matrimony
Obstacles, planetary afflictions, or personal circumstances postponing marriage beyond typical age brackets
Abrupt calling off of engagement, cancellation of wedding ceremonies, or total denial of marriage promise
A marital union facilitated, selected, and negotiated by parents, family members, or matches
A marital union initiated and chosen primarily by the couple themselves due to romantic love
A marital union spanning different traditional caste boundaries, highlighting progressive planetary influence
A marital union between individuals of different religious beliefs, indicating Rahu/Ketu or strong 9th/12th house influence
A secular, formal, and registered marriage performed before a government registrar under civil law
A marital union performed in secret without parental or public knowledge, indicating heavy 8th and 12th house influence
Co-habitation of two romantic partners without legal or formal marriage ceremonies, often triggered by Rahu or Uranus
A legal marital union following the death, divorce, or dissolution of the first marriage, signified by the 2nd and 9th houses
A legal marital union following the dissolution of the second marriage, signified by the 11th house
Re-marrying a former spouse or starting a fresh marital chapter after previous relationship terminations
A secret physical or emotional romantic relationship outside of the active legal marriage
Active arguments, ideological clashes, or domestic disputes between partners, signified by the 6th house
Lack of communication, coldness, and loss of emotional intimacy while cohabiting, signified by Saturn or Ketu in the 7th
A romantic relationship where partners are geographically separated, signified by the 3rd, 9th, and 12th houses
Physical separation or living in different homes due to relationship breakdown, without legal divorce
A formal, court-ordered legal separation where spouses remain legally married but live apart
The complete legal dissolution of a marital contract, signified by the 12th from the 7th (6th house) and the 12th house
Amicable and consensual dissolution of marriage under mutual agreement, minimizing malefic legal battles
A highly disputed and litigated divorce where one party challenges terms, requiring planetary warfare indicators
Ongoing court battles, legal proceedings, and dispute resolutions regarding marital friction
Physical, verbal, or emotional abuse within a household, signified by heavy afflictions of Mars, Rahu, and Saturn
Interim or final court-ordered financial maintenance support for a spouse during separation or litigation
One-time or recurring post-divorce financial settlement payouts, signified by the 8th and 12th houses
Legal dispute and court decision regarding custody, guardianship, and access to children after divorce
Resolution of differences, ending of litigation, and resuming cohabitation and harmony, signified by the 11th and 4th houses
Analyzing physical health, vital stability, and disease phases of the spouse, signified by the 7th house and its 6th/8th/12th lords
Physical passing away of the partner, signified by maraka/randhra positions relative to the 7th house
The state of living after the death of the spouse, signified by heavy afflictions in the 8th house and to key significators
Marriage with an individual from a foreign land, culture, or different nationality, signified by the 7th and 12th houses
Relocating to another city, state, or country after marriage, or partner moving for career purposes, signified by the 3rd and 12th houses
Seeking professional couples therapy or astrological consultation to resolve partnership friction and restore trust

natalPromise.description: Evaluation of relationship promises in the birth chart via cuspal sub-lords

cusps.description: Cuspal coordinates, degrees, and sign/star/sub/sub-sub lords

houseOccupants.description: Planets residing inside the boundary degrees of relevant houses

houseLords.description: Rulers of signs occupying the cuspal degrees of the 12 houses

starLords.description: Constellation rulers governing planet positions and cuspal points

subLords.description: Sub-divisional rulers of stellar spaces determining final outcome event trends in KP

subSubLords.description: Micro-sub divisional rulers of sub spaces for hyper-precise timing

planetSignificators.description: Planetary significators categorized by A, B, C, D grades in KP system

houseSignificators.description: List of planets signifying specific houses sorted by strength

retrograde.description: Planetary backward motion indicators causing delays or repeating situations
retrograde.treatment: Retrograde star-lords or sub-lords negate progress during major periods

combust.description: Planets in close proximity to the Sun losing their explicit outward strength

conjunction.description: Close longitudinal alignment of planets within orb values

aspect.description: Planetary aspects on houses and other planets according to Vedic degrees

dba.description: Dasha, Bhukti, and Antara lord timeline significance for event activation

transit.description: Current or projected planet transits over natal cusps and planetary degrees

moonTransit.description: Daily trigger verification based on transiting Moon over key Nakshatras

saturnTransit.description: Macro-structural trends, delays, and structural lessons verified via Saturn's position

jupiterTransit.description: Blessing, expansion, and event sanctioning triggers validated via Jupiter's transits

rulingPlanets.description: Ascendant Sign/Star Lord, Moon Sign/Star Lord, and Day Lord computed for query hour
rulingPlanets.usage: Cross-verification of horary queries or natal chart birth-time validation

horarySupport.description: KP Horary (Prasna) support based on a number from 1 to 249

supportingEvidence.description: Positive linkages where 7th sub lord signifies 2, 7, 11 and active DBA lords are positive significators

conflictingEvidence.description: Negative linkages where 7th sub lord signifies 1, 6, 12 and active DBA lords signify separation or delay

missingEvidence.description: Inability to verify precise sub-lords due to birth time uncertainty beyond 1 minute

d1.description: Rashi (Natal) Chart analysis of houses and planets

d9.description: Navamsha Chart - the core divisional chart representing marriage, spouse quality, and inner strength

d60.description: Shastiamsha Chart for macro-karma evaluation of relationship life promises

seventhHouse.description: Evaluation of the 7th house in D1 and D9 for occupants, aspects, and structural strength

seventhLord.description: Evaluation of placement, dignity, aspects, and star of the 7th house lord

secondHouse.description: Family addition house and financial accumulation analysis

eighthHouse.description: Sustenance of marriage (Mangalya Sthana), in-laws, and joint assets analysis

twelfthHouse.description: Bed comfort, physical intimacy, and expenditure house analysis

venus.description: Primary natural significator (Karaka) of relationship, wife, and love

jupiter.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of husband, wisdom, and divine blessing

mars.description: Significator of physical attraction, energy, passion, and Manglik Dosha impacts

saturn.description: Significator of commitment, long-term duty, delays, and dry spells

rahu.description: Significator of unconventional relationships, sudden attraction, and foreign spouse

ketu.description: Significator of detachment, distance, spiritual liberation, and separation

yogas.description: Planetary combinations like Malavya Yoga, Gaja Kesari Yoga, or negative marital combinations

doshas.description: Afflictions like Manglik Dosha, Kuja Dosha, Papakartari Dosha, or Rahu-Ketu axis afflictions

vimshottari.description: 120-year planetary dasha sequence showing psychological evolution and event triggers

transit.description: Double transit rules of Jupiter and Saturn sanctioning marriage and relationship changes

supportingEvidence.description: Strong 7th lord in kendra/trikona, benefic aspects on D1/D9 7th house, unafflicted Venus/Jupiter

conflictingEvidence.description: Afflicted 7th house by multiple malefics, debilitated Venus, 7th lord in 6/8/12 houses

atmakaraka.description: The planet with the highest longitudinal degree representing the soul's primary lessons

darakaraka.description: The planet with the lowest longitudinal degree representing the spouse and partnerships

upapada.description: Upapada Lagna (UL) - the arudha of the 12th house representing marriage partner and lineage

arudhaA7.description: Darapada (A7) - the arudha of the 7th house representing physical relationship and attraction

karakamsha.description: The sign occupied by the Atmakaraka in the Navamsha chart analyzed in D1

argala.description: Interventions or direct supports from planets in 2nd, 4th, 5th, and 11th from significator points

rashiDrishti.description: Sign aspects where cardinal signs aspect fixed signs (except adjacent) and mutable signs aspect each other

charaDasha.description: Jaimini sign-based dasha sequence timing critical relationship events

supportingEvidence.description: Benefic planets in or aspecting UL, clean aspect links between Atmakaraka and Darakaraka

conflictingEvidence.description: Malefics like Rahu, Ketu, or Saturn occupying or aspecting UL, afflicted Darakaraka

seventhHouse.description: Descendant cusp, its sign, and planets residing in the 7th house

venus.description: Planet of harmony, affection, aesthetic bonding, and social relationships

mars.description: Planet of sexual drive, passion, pursuit, and assertiveness in partnerships

saturn.description: Planet of boundaries, realistic commitments, longevity, and cold restrictions

pluto.description: Planet of deep psychological transformation, power struggles, and obsession in love

juno.description: Asteroid representing committed marriage partner, devotion, and structural fairness

composite.description: The midpoint chart combining two individuals to represent the relationship entity

synastry.description: Degree-to-degree aspect overlays between two individual natal charts

progressions.description: Secondary progressions showing emotional and psychological shifts over time

solarReturn.description: Annual return of the Sun to its birth degree, highlighting the theme of the year

transit.description: Outer planets (Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto) aspecting natal Venus/Descendant

nadiAmsa.description: Highly precise divisional arc (1/150th of a sign) determining micro-destiny

marriageRules.description: Bhrigu Nandi Nadi rules: Jupiter representing male native, Venus representing female native

timingRules.description: Transit nodes (Rahu/Ketu) conjuncting or aspecting Venus/Jupiter to activate events

supportingEvidence.description: Harmonious transit paths of key planets without Node intersections

relevantHouses.description: Houses 2, 7, and 8 evaluated using the unique Lal Kitab aspects and blind planet rules

sleepingPlanets.description: Planets in inactive houses that require manual triggers to awaken

artificialPlanets.description: Lal Kitab planetary pairs that merge to form a synthetic third planet's energy

remedies.description: Symbolic actions, charity, or domestic habits to rectify planetary afflictions

muntha.description: The progressed yearly point in the Varshaphala (annual) chart

varshaphala.description: The annual Solar Return chart calculated under Vedic Tajik rules

annualTrigger.description: Timing via Patyini Dasha or Mudda Dasha conjunct with transit aspects

phases.description: Historical events, retro-active verification, and previous relationship milestones
Current active energies, transits, and short-term trends
Medium-term dasha periods and major planetary shifts
Life-long promises, outer planetary transits, and macro-dasha levels

pipeline.name: Birth Data
pipeline.description: Validate date, time, and coordinates for precision

pipeline.name: Required System Available
pipeline.description: Verify calculation engines for selected systems are loaded

pipeline.name: Natal Promise
pipeline.description: Analyze fundamental life promise across KP cusps and Parashari houses

pipeline.name: Planet Validation
pipeline.description: Evaluate strength, dignity, and associations of significators

pipeline.name: House Validation
pipeline.description: Assess relevant house strengths, cuspal sub lords, and aspects

pipeline.name: Dasha Validation
pipeline.description: Examine Vimshottari and Chara dasha support for the timeframe

pipeline.name: Transit Validation
pipeline.description: Track current and upcoming transit triggers over key degrees

pipeline.name: Relationship Validation
pipeline.description: Evaluate mutual synastry and collective indicators

pipeline.name: Supporting Evidence
pipeline.description: Gather and weight all positive astrological signatures

pipeline.name: Conflicting Evidence
pipeline.description: Identify and evaluate malefic aspects, house negations, or afflictions

pipeline.name: Missing Evidence
pipeline.description: Identify critical data gaps or unfulfilled condition sets

pipeline.name: Evidence Package
pipeline.description: Assemble structured JSON payload containing all validated metrics

pipeline.name: AI
pipeline.description: Relay the structured evidence package to the LLM for objective, calculated translation to the user

types.description: Connectivity between a cusp sub-lord and the significator houses
Planetary ruler of the current Vimshottari dasha signifying event houses
A slow transiting planet conjunct with a natal significator degree

weightingSystem.description: Algorithmic weights for matching patterns across multiple astrological disciplines

marriageWindow.title: Auspicious Marriage Window Alert
marriageWindow.description: Fired when concurrent DBA and major transits align perfectly for marriage

relationshipChanges.title: Relationship Shift Warning
relationshipChanges.description: Fired when a shift in dasha lords alters relationship dynamics

transitAlerts.title: Major Planet Transit Alert
transitAlerts.description: Fired when Jupiter, Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu transit key degrees or conjunct key house lords

dailyRelationshipInsight.title: Daily Relationship Insight
dailyRelationshipInsight.description: Daily guidance based on transiting Moon's nakshatra and aspect to natal Venus

plannedFeatures.title: Dynamic Synastry Heatmap
plannedFeatures.description: Interactive visual map of exact degree-to-degree planetary synastry aspects

plannedFeatures.title: Detailed Koota Agreement Engine
plannedFeatures.description: Combine 36-point Koota matching with Ashtakavarga point distributions

plannedFeatures.title: AI Relationship Reconciliation Advisor
plannedFeatures.description: Generate compassionate advice matching transiting planetary relief vectors

extensibilityRules: All additions must be appended as nullable properties
Never delete or rename existing category or event IDs
Custom systems must be defined under a dedicated key within the systems schema
